name: gemini-web-bridge
description: Analyze public YouTube videos through the user's logged-in Gemini Web session.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Gemini Web about public YouTube videos
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex send a public YouTube URL and a scoped question to a dedicated, locally controlled Gemini Web browser session, then receive the complete answer as a tool result. Experimental and currently macOS-only.
defaultPrompt: 分析这个 YouTube 视频并给出带时间点的关键结论
